translation.en: O Best of forgivers
O Best of helpers
O Best of rulers
O Best of openers
O Best of providers
O Best of guides
O Best of givers
O Best of inheritors
O Best of praisers
O Best of rememberers

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الْخَلْقَ بِلَا مِثَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man khalaqa'l-khalqa bi lā mithāl

translation.en: O He Who created creation without precedent
O He Who made the mountains as pegs
O He Who appointed the angels as messengers

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَلَّقَ النُّجُومَ فِي السَّمَاءِ

translation.en: O He Who suspended the stars in the sky
O He Who adorned the heavens with stars
O He Who made the earth a resting place
translation.tr: Ey yeryüzünü karar kılınacak yer yapan

translation.en: O He Who made the sea an enclosure

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا

translation.en: O He Who made the sun a blazing lamp
translation.tr: Ey güneşi parlak bir kandil kılan

translation.en: O He Who made the moon a light

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ الْمَوْتَ أَجَلًا مَحْتُومًا

translation.en: O He Who made death an appointed time
translation.tr: Ey ölümü belirlenmiş bir vakit kılan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Sustainer of all travelers
O Companion of every stranger
O Friend of every lonely one
O Refuge of every exile
O Protector of every frightened one
O Helper of every one who seeks help
O Guide of every confused one
O Provider for every destitute one
O Merciful to every elder
O Light in every darkness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who opened the way for hope
O He Who expanded the path for supplication
O He Who is the goal of every need
O He Who is the end of every desire
O He Who is the source of every cure
O He Who is abundant in blessings
O He Who is great in wisdom
O He Who is eternal in existence

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَدِيمٌ بِلَا ابْتِدَاءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Qadīmun bi lā ibtidā'

translation.en: O He Who is ancient without beginning

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بَاقٍ بِلَا انْتِهَاءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Bāqin bi lā intihā'

translation.en: O He Who is everlasting without end

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who rewards the patient
O He Who accepts from the repentant
O He Who punishes the transgressors
O He Who pardons the sinners
O He Who is content with those who strive
O He Who enriches those who put their trust in Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَرِيبٌ مِنَ الدَّاعِينَ

translation.en: O He Who is near to those who call upon Him

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuḥīṭu bi kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Who surrounds all things
O He Who decrees all matters
O Best of planners

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Whose blessings are continuous
O He Whose generosity is flowing
O He Whose invitation is honored
O He Whose door is open
O He Whose nearness is a treasure
O He Whose forgiveness is a gift
O He Whose punishment is just
O He Whose support is near
O He Whose mercy encompasses all

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ فَضْلُهُ عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْخَلَائِقِ

translation.en: O He Whose favor is upon all creation
translation.tr: Ey lütfu tüm yaratılmışların üzerinde olan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who knows the secrets of hearts
O He Who sends the winds as glad tidings
O He Who began creation
O He Who returns creation
O He Who created souls
O He Who established the proof
O He Who perfected all things
O He Who is the Lord of mighty strength
O He Whose is the overwhelming proof
O He Who is the Master of all things

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O First without a first
O Last without a last
O Mighty without weakness
O Exalted without pride
O Powerful without oppression
O Gentle without haste
O Rich without need
O Great without arrogance
O Majestic without rival
O Generous beyond measure

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Helper of the weak
O Treasure of the poor
O Refuge of the fearful
O Companion of the righteous
O Pride of the humble
O Strength of the powerless
O Deliverer of the afflicted
O Elevator of the lowly
O Destroyer of oppressors
O Friend of the oppressed

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Whose is the creation and the command
translation.tr: Ey yaratma ve emir Kendisine ait olan

translation.en: O He Whose is the might and the dominion
translation.tr: Ey izzet ve saltanat Kendisine ait olan

translation.en: O He Whose is the kingdom and the majesty
translation.tr: Ey mülk ve azamet Kendisine ait olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ فِي كُلِّ حَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lahu'l-ḥamdu fī kulli ḥāl

translation.en: O He Whose is the praise in all conditions
translation.tr: Ey her hâlde hamd Kendisine ait olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ أَوَّلًا وَآخِرًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lahu'l-ḥamdu awwalan wa ākhirā

translation.en: O He Whose is the praise first and last
translation.tr: Ey ilk ve son hamd Kendisine ait olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ الْجَلَالُ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lahu'l-jalālu ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā

translation.en: O He Whose is the glory manifest and hidden
translation.tr: Ey açık ve gizli celâl Kendisine ait olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَفَاتِيحُ كُلِّ بَابٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man bi yadihī mafātīḥu kulli bāb

translation.en: O He Who holds the key to every door
translation.tr: Ey her kapının anahtarı elinde olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَلَيْهِ تَتَوَكَّلُ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ

translation.en: O He upon Whom every soul relies

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ تُرْفَعُ كُلُّ شَكْوَى
lines.transliteration: Yā Man ilayhi turfa'u kullu shakwā

translation.en: O He to Whom all complaints are directed

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُبْتَغَى كَرَمُهُ مِنَ الْجَمِيعِ

translation.en: O He Whose generosity is sought by all

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Light of the earth and the heavens
O Adornment of the earth and the heavens
O Sustainer of the earth and the heavens
O Master of the earth and the heavens
O Creator of the earth and the heavens
O Originator of the earth and the heavens
translation.tr: Ey yeri ve gökleri yoktan var eden

translation.en: O Key of the earth and the heavens
O Light of the light of the heavens
O Lord of lords
O God of gods

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Refuge in times of difficulty
O Hope in times of calamity
O Companion in times of loneliness
O Friend in times of solitude
O Shelter in times of exile
O Helper in times of trial
O Guide in times of confusion
O Provider in times of poverty
O Fortress in times of fear
O Rescuer in times of distress

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.
